mapper.sql: id, draft_id, published_version, trace_id, request_id, task_type, task_status, retry_times, error_message, next_run_at, locked_by, locked_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from content_publish_task where (task_status = 'PENDING' or task_status = 'FAILED') and (next_run_at is null or next_run_at <= #{now}) and (locked_at is null or locked_at < #{lockExpiredBefore}) order by updated_at asc, id asc limit #{limit} for update
